Projects

VR Safety & Moderation Analysis

Mixed-method research analyzing 15.8 million Reddit posts and conducting cognitive walkthroughs of safety features across VRChat, Horizon Worlds, and Rec Room.

Social VR Content Analysis Python

Decentralized Social Media Platform

A platform focusing on user-driven policy-making, incorporating crowd-sourcing methods and a Transformer-based model to adapt to users' preferred policies.

Decentralization Transformers Django

AI-Powered Fashion Recommender

A fashion recommendation system for gift selection with limited preference data, published at ACM CHI 2024 as a Late-Breaking Work.

Recommender Systems Machine Learning HCI

Blockchain-Enabled Educational Platform

A blockchain-based education website built with Django, React, and Docker, trialed at Sharif University of Technology. Won Bronze at IBCOL.

Blockchain React Docker
